name: Transform gesture
description: Shape transformation via translate, resize, or rotate

events.translate.completed: Moved {{distance.total}}px ({{distance.x}}, {{distance.y}}), grid snap: {{snapped.to.grid}}, shape snap: {{snapped.to.shape}}, cloned: {{was.cloned}}, took {{duration.ms}}ms

events.resize.started: Started resizing {{shapes.count}} shapes via {{handle.type}} handle, corner: {{is.corner}}
events.resize.completed: Scaled to ({{scale.x}}, {{scale.y}}), aspect locked: {{aspect.locked}}, flipped: x={{flipped.x}} y={{flipped.y}}, took {{duration.ms}}ms

events.rotate.started: Started rotating {{shapes.count}} shapes from {{initial.angle}} degrees around ({{center.x}}, {{center.y}})
events.rotate.completed: Rotated {{delta.degrees}} degrees to {{final.angle}} degrees, snapped: {{snapped.to.angle}} ({{snap.interval}} deg), took {{duration.ms}}ms
